# ElicitRequestURLParams.Url property

REQUIRED. The URL the user should navigate to (spec §20.3). MUST be a valid URI [RFC3986] containing a valid URL. The client MUST NOT pre-fetch it or open it without explicit user consent (§20.7).

```csharp
public string Url { get; set; }
```
